error.unexpectedRemove: An unexpected error occurred while removing the key.
error.unexpectedSave: An unexpected error occurred while saving.
error.unexpectedLoad: An unexpected error occurred while loading.
error.insufficientDiskSpace: Not enough disk space to complete the merge. Please free up space and try again.

common.confirmReload: Are you sure you want to reload the page? Any unsaved changes might be lost.
common.reportIssueAria: Open the issue report and logs dialog
common.splitScrollButtonAria: Scroll to top (upper half) or bottom (lower half)
common.updateRequiredBody: This version of Translator is no longer supported by the backend. Update the app to continue.

errors.needCookies: YouTube asked for a human check. Click Connect to continue.
errors.needCookiesYouTube: YouTube asked for a human check. Click Connect to continue.
errors.needCookiesGeneric: This site asked for a human check. Click Connect to continue.
errors.connectFailed: Could not connect. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedRemove: An unexpected error occurred while removing the key.
errors.unexpectedSave: An unexpected error occurred while saving.
errors.unexpectedLoad: An unexpected error occurred while loading.

byo.openaiKeyInvalid: Your OpenAI API key is invalid or expired. Please check your key in Settings.
byo.openaiRateLimit: OpenAI rate limit reached. Please wait a moment and try again.
byo.openaiInsufficientQuota: Your OpenAI account has insufficient credits. Please add credits at platform.openai.com.
byo.anthropicKeyInvalid: Your Anthropic API key is invalid or expired. Please check your key in Settings.
byo.anthropicRateLimit: Anthropic rate limit reached. Please wait a moment and try again.

byo.genericApiError: API request failed. Please check your API key and account status.

input.connectTip: Tip: In the Connect window, sign in or complete the check, then close the window to continue.
input.localFileDescription: Upload a video or audio file from your computer
input.webDescription: Paste YouTube, TikTok, Instagram video links, or direct video file URLs from web pages
input.featuresUnlockAfterTranscription: Translation and other menus will appear after transcription completes.

videoSuggestion.introTitle: Describe the kind of video you want.
videoSuggestion.introCopy: Start with a topic, mood, creator, or audience. Add country or recency only if it matters.
videoSuggestion.starterQuestion: Describe the kind of video you want. You can mention a topic, mood, creator, or target country.
videoSuggestion.defaultFollowUp: Add one more detail and I will refine the search.
videoSuggestion.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
videoSuggestion.placeholder: e.g. street interviews about AI policy
videoSuggestion.openFailed: Failed to open YouTube video link
videoSuggestion.resultsEmpty: Start with a plain-English request and I will search YouTube for good matches.
videoSuggestion.channelsEmpty: No channel shortcuts yet. Download a recommended video first.
videoSuggestion.channelUnavailable: Channel link is not available for this item.
videoSuggestion.missingLocalFile: Local file path is missing for this history item.
videoSuggestion.downloadedFileMissing: The local file is no longer available at its saved path.
videoSuggestion.searchFailed: I could not search right now. Try again in a moment.
videoSuggestion.noMatches: No strong matches yet. Add topic, mood, or creator and I will retry.
videoSuggestion.lowConfidenceNoScoredResults: No reliable matches survived ranking. Try a broader topic, add a creator hint, or switch recency.
videoSuggestion.lowConfidenceGeneric: Search confidence was low. Add one more detail and retry.
videoSuggestion.askMore: Tell me a bit more so I can find better matches.
videoSuggestion.platformHint: This strictly controls which platform is searched.
videoSuggestion.workflowHint: Describe what you want in plain English. Then pick a result and download it.
videoSuggestion.nextActionHint: Pick a video, then download it or open it on YouTube.
videoSuggestion.starterQuestionWithMemory: Last time you searched for {{summary}}. Want me to start there again?
videoSuggestion.quickStartUserMessage: Use my last saved preferences and find videos now: {{summary}}
videoSuggestion.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel the current search.
videoSuggestion.emptyCopy: Mention a topic, audience, creator style, or mood. Add country or recency only when it matters.
videoSuggestion.emptyTitle: Describe the video you want to source
videoSuggestion.noMoreResults: No more distinct results found. Try adjusting country or recency.
videoSuggestion.recencyHint: Use this when you want newer videos to rank higher.
videoSuggestion.searchingVeryLong: Taking longer than usual, but still running.
videoSuggestion.toggleCopy: Ask in your language. AI finds the right YouTube videos.

subtitles.voiceCloningRequiresTranslation: Voice cloning requires a target language
subtitles.cancel_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel the subtitle translation process? Any progress will be lost and you'll need to start again.

summary.title: Transcript Summary
summary.ctaHelper: Generate an in-depth overview. Long videos may take a moment to process.
summary.placeholder: Your AI summary will appear here once generated.
summary.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits to run the summary.
summary.noHighlights: No highlights yet. Generate to detect punchlines.
summary.noVideoForHighlights: Open the source video to cut highlight clips.
summary.summaryRequiredForHighlights: Generate a transcript summary before cutting highlight clips.
summary.verticalFormatDesc: Optimized for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Reels (9:16)

workspace.videoNeeded: Mount a source video to preview and merge
workspace.readyCopy: Fine-tune timing, line breaks, and translations here before saving the SRT or burning subtitles into the source media.
workspace.emptyCopy: Open an existing SRT to edit it directly. Generated transcripts from the main workflow will also appear here once ready.
workspace.mountVideoTitle: Mount the source video for preview and burn-in export
workspace.mountVideoCopy: You can keep editing without a video, but preview, seek, and merge work best once the source media is attached.
workspace.listCopy: Edit source text, translation, timing, and line-level actions directly in place.
workspace.mergeNeedsVideoCopy: Mount a source video before starting a burn-in export.

item.insertTitle: Insert new subtitle block after this one
item.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this subtitle block? This action cannot be undone.

header.saveAsTooltip: Save As first to enable direct save

settings.title: Settings
settings.creditsDescription: Buy credits. The hours shown are an estimate of the total video duration you can transcribe or translate. Example: transcribing and translating a 3‑hour video uses about 6 hours (≈140,000 credits).

qualityTranscription.label: Quality Transcription
qualityTranscription.help: On: sequential, uses prior-line context. Off: faster batched mode.

qualityTranslation.label: Quality Translation
qualityTranslation.help: 5× credits • Adds review phase for higher quality
qualityTranslation.helpWithEstimateOn: 5× credits • GPT-5.1 draft + GPT-5.4 review • Balance: ~{{time}}

qualitySummary.label: Quality Summary
qualitySummary.help: 4× credits • Deep analysis + highlight clips with Claude Opus
qualitySummary.helpOn: 4× credits • GPT-5.4 deep analysis + highlight clips
qualitySummary.helpWithEstimateOn: 4× credits • GPT-5.4 deep analysis + highlight clips • Balance: ~{{time}}

qualityDubbing.label: Quality Dubbing
qualityDubbing.help: 12× credits • ElevenLabs TTS with premium voices
qualityDubbing.helpOn: {{ratio}}× credits • ElevenLabs TTS with premium voices
qualityDubbing.helpWithEstimateOn: {{ratio}}× credits • ElevenLabs TTS with premium voices • Balance: ~{{time}}

videoSuggestionModel.label: Video Recommendation Quality
videoSuggestionModel.help: Uses the same backend model tier as translation.

dubbing.voiceHelp: Choose the default voice used when generating dubbed audio.
dubbing.mixLabel: Dubbing Volume vs Original Video Volume
dubbing.mixHelp: Control how much of the original soundtrack plays underneath the dubbed voice.
dubbing.voiceCloningDesc: Preserve the original speaker's voice in dubbed audio
dubbing.voiceCloningInsufficientCredits: Requires at least 1 minute of credits
dubbing.voiceCloningEnabled: Voice cloning is enabled with ElevenLabs. The original speaker's voice will be preserved in the dubbed audio.
dubbing.voiceCloningInfo: Voice cloning uses ElevenLabs Dubbing API to analyze and recreate the original speaker's voice.

byoOpenAi.title: Bring Your Own API Keys
byoOpenAi.description: Unlock a one-time upgrade to use your own API keys. Once unlocked, any transcription, translation, dubbing, or summary runs directly on your accounts instead of consuming Stage5 credits.
byoOpenAi.unlockHint: Once unlocked, add your API keys here at any time to toggle direct billing on your accounts.
byoOpenAi.unlockedDescription: Enter your OpenAI API key below. Transcription, translation, and dubbing will run directly against your OpenAI account when a key is present.
byoOpenAi.toggleHelp: When off, AI Credits are used.
byoOpenAi.toggleOn: Using your OpenAI key for AI tasks.
byoOpenAi.toggleOff: Using Stage5 credits for AI tasks.
byoOpenAi.howToGetKeys: How do I get API keys?
byoOpenAi.economicsBody: Stage5 credits optimize for convenience (no setup). BYO pays providers directly—usually ~30–50% cheaper depending on your pack.
byoOpenAi.encryptionUnavailable: Secure storage is not available on this system. API keys cannot be saved.

byoPreferences.title: Provider Preferences
byoPreferences.pricingHintHeuristic: Estimated cost using current app heuristics
byoPreferences.videoSuggestionModelUnavailable: No BYO video recommendation model is currently available. Enable OpenAI or Anthropic BYO for this feature.
byoPreferences.videoSuggestionModelRequiresOpenAi: Requires OpenAI BYO unlock, key, and toggle.
byoPreferences.videoSuggestionModelRequiresAnthropic: Requires Anthropic BYO unlock, key, and toggle.

openai.description: OpenAI powers transcription (Whisper), translation (GPT), and text-to-speech dubbing.
openai.step2: Sign up or log in to your account
openai.step5: Add a payment method in Billing settings (required to use the API)
openai.step6: Copy the key (starts with sk-) and paste it in Stage5
openai.note: Tip: New OpenAI accounts often get free credits to start. You only pay for what you use.

anthropic.description: Claude provides higher-quality translation reviews. Without it, GPT handles all translation tasks.
anthropic.step2: Sign up or log in to your account
anthropic.step5: Add a payment method in Plans & Billing (required to use the API)
anthropic.step6: Copy the key (starts with sk-ant-) and paste it in Stage5
anthropic.note: Tip: Anthropic offers pay-as-you-go pricing. You only pay for what you use.

elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs offers premium transcription and voice-cloning dubbing. Without it, OpenAI handles these tasks.
elevenlabs.ttsDescription: ElevenLabs offers premium transcription and dubbing voices. Without it, OpenAI handles these tasks.
elevenlabs.step2: Sign up or log in to your account
elevenlabs.step3: Click your profile icon and select
elevenlabs.step4: Add a payment method in Subscription settings (required for API usage beyond free tier)
elevenlabs.step5: Copy your API key and paste it in Stage5
elevenlabs.note: Tip: ElevenLabs has a free tier with limited usage. For more, upgrade to a paid plan in your account settings.

byoAnthropic.title: Anthropic API Key (Optional)
byoAnthropic.description: Add your Anthropic API key to use Claude models directly for the translation review phase. Without this key, GPT-5.4 handles the review pass instead.
byoAnthropic.toggleHelp: When off, Claude requests use Stage5 credits.
byoAnthropic.toggleOn: Using your Anthropic key for Claude models.
byoAnthropic.toggleOff: Using Stage5 credits for Claude models.

stage5TtsProvider.label: TTS Quality (Stage5 Credits)
stage5TtsProvider.openaiHintWithBalance: Good quality · Your balance: {{time}} of dubbing
stage5TtsProvider.elevenlabsHintWithBalance: Best quality · Your balance: {{time}} of dubbing

siteConnection.title: Website connection
siteConnection.clearConfirm: This will sign you out of {{site}} inside Translator. Continue?

credits.title: AI Credits
credits.notEnough: Insufficient credits. Please purchase more credits to continue.

videoPlayer.icloudWaitingBody: This file is not stored locally yet. In Finder, click 'Download' and wait for the cloud icon to disappear.
videoPlayer.icloudWaitingHint: The video will load automatically when the download finishes.

admin.title: Admin
admin.toggleByoPreviewTitle: Admin: Toggle BYO preview mode (see UI as if BYO not purchased)
admin.confirmResetCreditsToZero: Are you sure you want to reset credits to 0? This cannot be undone.

creditWarning.message: Purchase credits in <settingsLink>{{settingsLinkText}}</settingsLink> to use translation and transcription features.

validation.processingDuration: Video duration is being processed. Please try again shortly.
validation.icloudPlaceholder: This file is stored in iCloud. In Finder, click 'Download' and wait for the cloud icon to finish, then try again.
validation.insufficientCreditsForVoiceCloning: Insufficient credits for voice cloning. Video is {{duration}} min but you can only afford {{affordable}} min. Please add credits or disable voice cloning.
validation.fileTooLargeForVoiceCloning: Video file is too large for voice cloning ({{size}}MB). Maximum allowed is {{max}}MB. Please use a shorter video or disable voice cloning.

workflow.sourceLoadingDescription: The downloaded source is being prepared for transcription.
workflow.sourceReadyDescription: Your selected media is ready for the next step.
workflow.transcribeDescription: Turn the source media into an editable subtitle track before moving on to translation or dubbing.
workflow.translateDubDescription: Your transcript is mounted. Choose the output language, translation mode, or dubbing next.
workflow.availableOutputsDescription: Downloaded and dubbed media remain available here until you save the versions you want to keep.
workflow.saveOutputsDescription: Keep any source or dubbed media you want to preserve outside the app workspace.

apiKeysRequired.title: API Keys Required
apiKeysRequired.message: To use your API keys for all AI operations, you need translation coverage and audio coverage. OpenAI covers both. Anthropic needs OpenAI or ElevenLabs for audio.
apiKeysRequired.ready: Coverage complete. You can enable My API keys now.

unsavedSrtOnTranscribe.title: Save current subtitles before transcribing?
unsavedSrtOnTranscribe.message: You already have subtitles mounted. Transcribing will replace them. What would you like to do?

dialogs.cancelTranslationConfirm: Cancel translation? Progress will be lost and you'll need to start again.
dialogs.cancelDubbingConfirm: Cancel dubbing? Progress will be lost and you'll need to start again.
dialogs.cancelDownloadConfirm: Cancel download? Progress will be lost and you'll need to start again.
dialogs.mergeLowDiskSpaceConfirm: Low disk space detected. This merge may need ~{{need}} free space, but only ~{{free}} is available. Continue anyway?

slowProcessingBanner.title: Processing is taking longer than usual.
slowProcessingBanner.description: This might be due to high demand or issues with OpenAI's servers. The process is still running in the background.

slowDownloadBanner.title: Download is taking longer than usual.
slowDownloadBanner.description: This may be due to video platform changes or new protection measures. You may need to wait for the next app version to handle newer videos.

creditRanOut.title: Credits ran out
creditRanOut.message: Your AI credits have run out. Recharge in Settings, then resume where you left off.

logs.title: Recent Logs
logs.emailBodyPrefix:
Hi,

Please find my recent logs below to help debug the issue.
logs.optionalMessagePlaceholder: What were you trying to do?
logs.reportPrompt: Something went wrong. Report this to the creator for a quick fix.
